summary: Iteration 5 — nutrition + add food flow. Backend: 19/19 pytest tests PASSED (foods search, recents, meal CRUD with servings math, nutrition/today grouping/ordering, home↔nutrition parity, seed-on-create, no _id leaks). Frontend: nutrition-root loads with all required testIDs (nutrition-summary + cal-consumed/target/remaining, protein/carbs/fat tracks, meal-breakfast/lunch/dinner/snack + add buttons). Seed populated cal-consumed=385 kcal (>0) on first launch. meal-lunch-add navigated to /nutrition/add?meal_type=lunch. add-root, add-search, recent-section, food-f-001 all present. Typing 'chick' returned Chicken breast (food-f-001). QuantitySheet opened, preview-kcal at 1 serving=165, at 1.5 servings=248 (exact spec match). Confirm POST /meals succeeded, router.back() returned to /nutrition, lunch section then showed 1 entry ('1.5 × 100 g', 248 kcal). BUG FOUND & FIXED: home.tsx used <Pressable> without importing it (would red-screen on home load); import added. Font decoding warnings in web preview are Metro asset-resolver cosmetic noise, not a code defect.

ui_bugs.issue: Pressable used at line 254 but not imported from react-native — would cause red-screen on home load. FIXED by adding Pressable to the react-native import block.

action_items: None blocking — the missing Pressable import was fixed by the testing agent. Main agent should verify the fix is acceptable and continue.
critical_code_review_comments: home.tsx: Pressable was used without import (fixed). Consider running `tsc --noEmit` or ESLint no-undef in CI to catch this class of bug before it reaches a screen.
server.py at 1126 lines is approaching the 700-line guideline. Nutrition catalog/models could move to backend/nutrition.py for maintainability.
TodayResponse computes but discards a local rnd (line 496–498) — minor dead code retained under a legacy comment; safe to remove.
seed_data_creation: Created 2 TEST_ profiles via API for backend test module + 1 TEST_UIProfile for the Playwright flow. Backend seed-on-create automatically populates today's logged_meals so nothing was manually inserted.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Nutrition catalog has 70 foods, id format 'f-001'..'f-070'. Chicken breast id is f-001 (165 kcal/100g). Profile creation seeds ~3 breakfast entries + optional snack (deterministic per profile). Backend recents endpoint aggregates logged_meals so freshly-created profiles have non-empty recents. AsyncStorage web backing stores profile id as JSON-stringified quoted string under 'vyro.profile.id'.
rca_of_issue: home.tsx: while wrapping NutritionBar in a Pressable for /nutrition navigation, the Pressable identifier was added to JSX but never added to the react-native import statement. Reproduction: open / (which redirects to /home when a profile exists) — React throws ReferenceError: Pressable is not defined. Mitigation: added `Pressable,` to the react-native named-imports block.
